scripts.typecheck:core: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/memory/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/orchestrator/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/guardian/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/execution/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/workspace/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck:core && npm run test
